piece.title: Light on Still Water
piece.notes: F Lydian companion piece to Still Cove. Slower and more luminous. The raised 4th (I-II Lydian shimmer) is the signature. Counterpoint only in rise section. Not yet tested in Logic — try Still Cove instrument palette first as a starting point.

sections.name: dawn
sections.notes: Pure Lydian shimmer. I-II establishes the raised 4th floating quality immediately.

sections.name: rise
sections.notes: Emotional center. Counterpoint strings enter here.

sections.name: peak
sections.notes: Most harmonic motion. Walking bass + develop melody + full voicings.

sections.name: dissolve
sections.notes: Returns to opening shimmer. Generative melody wanders over Lydian I-II drone.
